details.test: Task 1: Request quote for cheapest VR safety training package under $15,000 for 50 employees
Task 2: Submit project brief for XR campaign-style package under $40,000
Task 3: Create shortlist "Training ideas" with 3 VR case studies
Task 4: Configure pop-up installation and submit configuration for quote
Task 5: Register for beginner XR strategy workshop within 60 days under $300
Task 6: Apply for mid-level UX Designer XR role without CV upload
Task 7: Submit agency partnership inquiry for white-label XR production over $60,000
Task 8: Save 3 XR museum/exhibition articles to "XR Inspiration" reading list
